(module fizzbuzz

(fn main -> int
  (set args array (argv))
  (set n int (string_to_int (array_get args 0)))
  (for i 1 (add n 1)
    (cond
      ((and (eq (mod i 3) 0) (eq (mod i 5) 0)) (println "FizzBuzz"))
      ((eq (mod i 3) 0) (println "Fizz"))
      ((eq (mod i 5) 0) (println "Buzz"))
      (true (println i))))
  (ret 0))

)

(module reverse_words

(fn main -> int
  (set args array (argv))
  (set sentence string (array_get args 0))
  (set words array (string_split sentence " "))
  (set reversed array (array_reverse words))
  (set result string (string_join reversed " "))
  (println result)
  (ret 0))
)

import sys

words = sys.argv[1].split()
print(' '.join(reversed(words)))

(module two_sum

(fn main -> int
  (set args array (argv))
  (set target int (string_to_int (array_get args 0)))
  (set nums_str string (array_get args 1))
  (set parts array (string_split nums_str " "))
  (set len int (array_length parts))

  (set nums array (array_new))
  (for i 0 len
    (set nums (array_push nums (string_to_int (array_get parts i)))))

  (set found bool false)
  (set result_i int -1)
  (set result_j int -1)

  (for i 0 len
    (for j (add i 1) len
      (if (eq (add (array_get nums i) (array_get nums j)) target)
        (set found true)
        (set result_i i)
        (set result_j j)
        (break)))
    (if found (break)))

  (if found
    (print result_i)
    (print " ")
    (println result_j)
    (else (println "-1")))

  (ret 0))
)

(module word_freq
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (if (lt (array_length args) 1)
      (println "Usage: word_freq <text>")
      (ret 1))
    (set text string (array_get args 0))
    (set lower string (string_to_lower text))
    (set words array (string_split lower " "))
    (set counts map (map_new))
    (set len int (array_length words))
    (set cnt int 0)
    (set word string "")
    (for i 0 len
      (set word (array_get words i))
      (if (gt (string_length word) 0)
        (if (map_has counts word)
          (set cnt (map_get counts word))
          (set counts (map_set counts word (add cnt 1)))
          (else
            (set counts (map_set counts word 1))))))
    (set keys array (map_keys counts))
    (set keys (array_sort keys))
    (set klen int (array_length keys))
    (for i 0 klen
      (set word (array_get keys i))
      (set cnt (map_get counts word))
      (println (string_format "{} {}" word cnt)))
    (ret 0)))

a b c a b a

import sys
from collections import Counter

text = sys.argv[1]
words = text.lower().split()
counts = Counter(words)
for word in sorted(counts):
    print(f"{word} {counts[word]}")

(module bracket_checker

(fn main -> int
  (set args array (argv))
  (if (lt (array_length args) 1)
    (println "false")
    (ret 0))
  (set s string (array_get args 0))
  (set stack array (array_new))
  (set len int (string_length s))
  (set valid bool true)
  (set i int 0)
  (while (and valid (lt i len))
    (set c int (string_get s i))
    (cond
      ((or (eq c 40) (or (eq c 91) (eq c 123)))
       (array_push stack c))
      ((eq c 41)
       (if (eq (array_length stack) 0)
         (set valid false)
         (else
           (set top int (array_pop stack))
           (if (ne top 40) (set valid false)))))
      ((eq c 93)
       (if (eq (array_length stack) 0)
         (set valid false)
         (else
           (set top int (array_pop stack))
           (if (ne top 91) (set valid false)))))
      ((eq c 125)
       (if (eq (array_length stack) 0)
         (set valid false)
         (else
           (set top int (array_pop stack))
           (if (ne top 123) (set valid false))))))
    (set i (add i 1)))
  (if (and valid (eq (array_length stack) 0))
    (println "true")
    (else (println "false")))
  (ret 0))

)

(module rle
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (set s string (array_get args 0))
    (set len int (string_length s))
    (if (eq len 0)
      (ret 0))
    (set cur_char string (string_slice s 0 1))
    (set count int 1)
    (for i 1 len
      (set ch string (string_slice s i 1))
      (if (string_equals ch cur_char)
        (set count (add count 1))
        (else
          (print cur_char)
          (print count)
          (set cur_char ch)
          (set count 1))))
    (print cur_char)
    (println count)
    (ret 0)))

(module query_parser

  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (if (eq (array_length args) 0)
      (ret 0))
    (set query string (array_get args 0))
    (if (eq (string_length query) 0)
      (ret 0))
    (set pairs array (string_split query "&"))
    (set pairs (array_sort pairs))
    (for-each pair string pairs
      (if (gt (string_length pair) 0)
        (println pair)))
    (ret 0)))

(module rpn_eval

(fn evaluate_rpn expr string -> int
  (set tokens array (string_split expr " "))
  (set stack array (array_new))
  (set len int (array_length tokens))
  (set token string "")
  (set a int 0)
  (set b int 0)
  (for i 0 len
    (set token (array_get tokens i))
    (cond
      ((string_equals token "+")
        (set b (array_pop stack))
        (set a (array_pop stack))
        (array_push stack (add a b)))
      ((string_equals token "-")
        (set b (array_pop stack))
        (set a (array_pop stack))
        (array_push stack (sub a b)))
      ((string_equals token "*")
        (set b (array_pop stack))
        (set a (array_pop stack))
        (array_push stack (mul a b)))
      ((string_equals token "/")
        (set b (array_pop stack))
        (set a (array_pop stack))
        (array_push stack (div a b)))
      (true
        (array_push stack (string_to_int token)))))
  (ret (array_pop stack)))

(fn main -> int
  (set args array (argv))
  (set expr string (array_get args 0))
  (set result int (evaluate_rpn expr))
  (println result)
  (ret 0))
)

(module matrix_transpose

(fn parse_matrix src string -> array
  (set rows array (string_split src ";"))
  (set result array (array_new))
  (set num_rows int (array_length rows))
  (set row_str string "")
  (set cells array (array_new))
  (for i 0 num_rows
    (set row_str (array_get rows i))
    (set cells (string_split row_str ","))
    (set result (array_push result cells)))
  (ret result))

(fn transpose matrix array -> array
  (set num_rows int (array_length matrix))
  (set first_row array (array_get matrix 0))
  (set num_cols int (array_length first_row))
  (set result array (array_new))
  (set col array (array_new))
  (set row array (array_new))
  (set val string "")
  (for j 0 num_cols
    (set col (array_new))
    (for i 0 num_rows
      (set row (array_get matrix i))
      (set val (array_get row j))
      (set col (array_push col val)))
    (set result (array_push result col)))
  (ret result))

(fn main -> int
  (set args array (argv))
  (set src string (array_get args 0))
  (set matrix array (parse_matrix src))
  (set transposed array (transpose matrix))
  (set num_rows int (array_length transposed))
  (set row array (array_new))
  (set line string "")
  (for i 0 num_rows
    (set row (array_get transposed i))
    (set line (string_join row ","))
    (println line))
  (ret 0))
)

import sys

matrix = [[int(x) for x in row.split(',')] for row in sys.argv[1].split(';')]
transposed = list(zip(*matrix))
for row in transposed:
    print(','.join(str(x) for x in row))

(module caesar_cipher

(fn shift_char code int shift int base int -> int
  (set relative int (sub code base))
  (ret (add base (mod (add relative shift) 26))))

(fn process_message msg string shift int -> string
  (set result string "")
  (set len int (string_length msg))
  (for i 0 len
    (set c int (string_get msg i))
    (cond
      ((and (ge c 65) (le c 90))
       (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code (shift_char c shift 65)))))
      ((and (ge c 97) (le c 122))
       (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code (shift_char c shift 97)))))
      (true
       (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code c))))))
  (ret result))

(fn main -> int
  (set args array (argv))
  (if (lt (array_length args) 3)
    (println "Usage: caesar encode|decode shift message")
    (ret 1))
  (set mode string (array_get args 0))
  (set amount int (string_to_int (array_get args 1)))
  (set msg string (array_get args 2))
  (set raw_shift int (mod amount 26))
  (set effective_shift int raw_shift)
  (if (eq mode "decode")
    (set effective_shift (mod (sub 26 raw_shift) 26)))
  (set output string (process_message msg effective_shift))
  (println output)
  (ret 0))
)
